message:
fix(polyfills): fix hrtime to not use BigInt for compatibility

The hrtime polyfill was using BigInt literals (1000000n) which causes
"cannot convert BigInt to number" errors when code tries to mix BigInt
with Number operations.

Changes:
- hrtime() now returns [seconds, nanoseconds] array like Node.js
- hrtime.bigint() returns number instead of BigInt for compatibility
- Updated both runtime.js and node_polyfill.js polyfills
